description: Salesforce OAuth 2.0 JWT Bearer Token flow credentials for server-to-server integration

loginUrl.title: Login URL
loginUrl.description: Salesforce login endpoint (login.salesforce.com for production, test.salesforce.com for sandboxes)

clientId.title: Consumer Key
clientId.description: Connected App Consumer Key from Salesforce Setup

username.title: Integration User
username.description: Email address of the Salesforce integration user

privateKey.title: Private Key (PEM)
privateKey.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key for JWT signing. The corresponding X.509 certificate must be uploaded to the Connected App in Salesforce.
